task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the GNU Health patient record for Roberto Carlos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health GUI should be visible with the patient record or chart open for 'Roberto Carlos'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented a cardiac diagnosis with ICD-10 code I21 or I25.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Conditions', 'Diseases', or 'Evaluations' tab/window showing an active diagnosis containing the code 'I21' or 'I25' for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent prescribed at least two of the following drug classes: Antiplatelet (e.g., aspirin), Statin, or Beta-blocker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Prescriptions' or 'Medications' screen showing orders for at least two of the required classes (e.g., Aspirin/Acetylsalicylic acid, Atorvastatin/Simvastatin, Metoprolol/Bisoprolol).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent ordered at least two baseline lipid/cholesterol monitoring laboratory tests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Lab Tests' or 'Requests' screen showing at least two lipid-related tests ordered (e.g., Lipid panel, Total Cholesterol, LDL, HDL, Triglycerides).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent documented lifestyle counseling for smoking cessation or a cardiac diet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for clinical notes, evaluations, or lifestyle documentation fields containing text related to 'smoking cessation', 'quit smoking', or 'cardiac diet'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent scheduled a cardiology follow-up appointment in 21 to 35 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Appointments' screen showing a scheduled appointment for Roberto Carlos with a date that is 3 to 5 weeks (21-35 days) after the current system date.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the GNU Health GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health (Tryton) desktop client interface being navigated, rather than terminal windows executing SQL commands or python scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual GNU Health application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine GNU Health application, not a text editor, mock-up, or generic web browser displaying the task description.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just write the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening a text editor (like gedit or nano) to simply type out 'Diagnosis I21, Aspirin, Statin...' instead of entering them into the medical record system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient: Roberto Carlos. Required diagnosis codes: ICD-10 starting with I21 or I25. Required medications: At least 2 of Antiplatelet (e.g., aspirin), Statin, or Beta-blocker. Required labs: At least 2 lipid/cholesterol tests. Required follow-up: Scheduled strictly between 21 and 35 days from the task start date.
